data.body:
[Blue Archive's Summer Vacation Special Gift]

Schale has prepared 2 special gifts for your Summer Vacation, Sensei!
Please check your mailbox (Available until 7/31/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC)) and event page for the gifts💙

#BlueArchive

➡️ Online Merch Bundle
